creator: sroberts@internet-mail.org
text:
Attempts to install fresh Gnome-2 fails due to fetch errors for lsof_4.79J.freebsd.tar.bz2

Fix: Make lsof_4.79J.freebsd.tar.bz2 available on source servers defined in the port's makefile


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD-7
Upgrade OS to latest Stable
Upgrade all ports
Attempt to install Gnome-2 from ports
